text_original: probably the worst roleplay chat bot I have ever used
text_zh: 这可能是我用过的最差的角色扮演聊天机器人。
reply_original: I am truly sorry for the unpleasant experience you've had. I completely understand your frustration and sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. We care deeply about your experience and want to make things right. Please contact us at support@fantachat.ai with specific details so we can improve the AI for you. We will do better!
reply_zh: 对于给您带来的不愉快体验，我深表歉意。我完全理解您的沮丧，并为给您带来的不便诚挚道歉。我们非常重视您的体验，并希望能够弥补。请通过 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们并提供具体细节，以便我们为您改进 AI。我们会做得更好！
